slide1.text1: Never miss anything: Here you can find all the events of the Bavarian State Opera, the Bavarian State Ballet, and the Bavarian State Orchestra at a glance – and many <30 offers.
slide1.title: Welcome to <30

slide2.text1: No printing, no rummaging in your pockets: Keep all tickets and news in one place.
slide2.text2: Book your tickets quickly and easily right here, in your <30 app.
slide2.title: Keep your tickets under control

slide3.text1: Connect with other opera, ballet, or music lovers and share your experiences with them.
slide3.text2: Become part of the <30-Circle and enjoy even cheaper tickets and special events.
slide3.title: Become part of the community

COMPLETED.description: You can find your tickets in the My app-tickets section.
